name: Dilly Ham Balls
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Finely chopped fresh dill (or 3 tsp dried dill)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the ham, bread crumbs, onions, fresh dill (or dried dill), milk, egg, mustard, and 1/4 tsp pepper; mix well.
2. Shape into 1-inch balls.
3. In a large skillet, heat 1 tbsp butter and 1 tbsp oil. Brown the ham balls, adding more butter and oil as needed. Remove to a serving dish and cover; keep warm.
4. Pour the ham drippings into a saucepan; stir in flour. Gradually add water and stir until smooth. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until thickened.
5. Add sour cream and remaining dill and pepper; heat through, but do not boil. Pour over the ham balls.
6. Serve over noodles.
